title: tephrosia tinctoria var. coccinea
intro: Tephrosia tinctoria var. coccinea, also known as the red tree bush or red tephrosia, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Tephrosia tinctoria var. coccinea is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including decoction, infusion, and ointment, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
